title: Iridescent Wilds
description: Explore new biomes full of mystery, adventure, and unique landscapes waiting to be discovered.
body:
![IW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ACj1Vo29/images/001cfe6a507e318356f981f4ff1f632007b5795c.png)

![Iridescent Wilds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f478422e10fd071cea99c74011346f8f55c46bca.png)


Venture into the Iridescent Wilds, a realm of untamed beauty and mystery. Stroll through the luminous Crysal Grove, where towering trees and radiant flowers pierce the darkness. Descend into Glowithar Cave, where the ground vibrates with light beneath your steps. Dare to enter Blightshroom Hollow, a twisted Nether domain shrouded in colossal mushrooms and a sinister aura. And so much more!!!!

# **PLEASE READ! IF YOUR GAME CRASHES AFTER INSTALLING THIS MOD, INSTALL ARCHITECTURE API TEMPORARILY (WILL BE FIXED IN NEXT UPDATE :)**

**Please keep in mind that this mod is still in development, and many features are not yet final!**
